texto: How others perceive us is entirely up to us. A man is what he makes of himself. He can be treated with respect and goodwill, or he can be crushed underfoot like a worm. If you want to be successful in the world of trade and commerce, then you must look successful.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Petra Durst Benning: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “How others perceive us is entirely up to us. A man is what he makes of himself. He can be treated…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que sucesso, fundamental, image pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de image e key.
